title: Hejo 4 Pcs 100ml Matte White Reed Diffuser Bottles Silver Cover with 100 Diffusers Sticks (50Pcs beige+50Pcs black), Stylish Elegant Lovely Diffuse Bottles with Diffuser Reeds Sticks
features: 【Elegant empty bottle design】Matte White Reed Diffuser Bottles Silver Caps and safely packaged (4 pcs), making it the best choice for making your own reed diffuser kit. The reed diffuser base is very artistic style, solid, transparent and stable bottom.

【Premium quality】Reed Diffuser Sticks are made of mould-proof and dry vine, porous and deft, after mould-proof processing and dry processing, easy to perfume and to prevent mildew. These glass diffuser bottles have strong, stable bottoms that provide a stable base for the reeds diffusing the sheets.

【Lasting fragrance】Elegant glass bottle with reed diffusion stick, release refreshing fragrance, create a relaxed atmosphere. You can choose to add or remove the number of reed sticks to suit your taste. It takes 1 or 2 days for the fabric stick to soak in the odor. When the aroma is weakened, just turn the reed stick upside down or replace it with a new one.

【Improve your life quality】After you fill fragrance refill inside our empty glass diffuser bottle, this reed diffuser DIY set can help you improve your sleep quality, create serene atmosphere, remove the uncomfortable smell in the bathroom, keep you energetic in the office.
【Applicable places】Can be as a DIY craft, home decor, brings you luscious romantic scented for everyday use, family, office, weddings, spa, meditation, bathroom set.
description: Product description Specifications: ✧Material: vine and glass ✧Color: Matte white bottle and silver cover. Beige and black vine ✧The volume of the bottle: 100ml Features: ღHealthy benefit: The diffuser reeds can have amazing effects when inhaled on the part of the brain that controls emotions and behaviour with some even helping with migraines! ღElegant design: These reed diffusers won't detract from the appearance of your carefully decorated rooms. The classic glass design and steel caps will add a touch of class to your home. ღEasy to clean and store: Microwave and fridge safe. These diffuser bottles are dishwasher safe so after all the oil has been used up, you can wash them and create a new smell that won’t be tainted by the remains of the previous. Oils are not included. Package Included : 4x Matte White Reed Diffuser Bottles Silver Caps 100x Diffuser Sticks (50Pcs beige+50Pcs black) Note: Please check the size measurement chart carefully before making payment. Please allow 0.5-1 inch difference due to manual measurement. (1 inch=2.54cm) The color of the actual items may slightly different from the listing images due to different computer screen, thanks for your understanding. Directions Prepare the reed diffuser by filling matte white bottle with your preferred essential oil or fragrance. Add 100 sticks (50 beige and 50 black) to bottle. Allow 1-2 days for reeds absorb release Flip over enhance scent replace them new ones when aroma weakens. Enjoy refreshing fragrance improved atmosphere in home, office, any other applicable place. Safety Warning Avoid direct skin contact with undiluted essential oils. Keep out of reach of children and pets. Ensure proper ventilation during use. See more
